ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting , Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #8, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for and with Thomas Lucas by zoom.

The Court noted that Mr. Pun passed away after filing of this petition and asked if the parties had anything to add. Ms. Callejo stated that the Probate Examiner had questions regarding actions taken to preserve the one share of the AT&T common stock, that they are talking about $50.00, that the amount of costs for her time and Mr. Lucas' time to file a response to the Examiner's notes would be cost ineffective and that the stock was escheated to the State of California several years ago. Ms. Callejo also spoke of the difficulty in communicating with the State during this COVID pandemic. The Court raised the issue of balancing the accountings, stated that the details are what help balance the accountings and spoke of the Court's responsibility to make sure the trust assets are accounted for. The Court also stated that going forward it will not take that opinion as a reason to not respond to the notes and spoke of costs to the Court in preparing for these hearing matters. The Eighth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
